incident_details.short_description: Case timeline shows 'records could not be loaded' for support agents
incident_details.description: Support agents can open Case records but the Timeline control displays 'Records could not be loaded because of an unexpected error'. System Administrators do not see the issue.

resolution.root_cause: The Support Agent security role had Case privileges but lacked read privileges for one of the activity tables displayed in the Timeline control.
resolution_steps: Confirmed the issue affected users with the Support Agent role and not System Administrators.
Compared Timeline activity types configured on the Case form with privileges granted to the Support Agent role.
Granted read access for the missing activity table at Business Unit scope.
Asked an affected user to refresh the browser and reopen the Case record.
Verified the Timeline loaded emails, phone calls, notes, and custom transcript activities without error.

source_inspiration.title: Records could not be loaded because of an unexpected error
Sharing a model-driven app - assigning security roles and privileges
